titlestmt.titleproper: Gregory E. Montes urban history and travel collection8035
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Kathryn Flannigan

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-01-07 18:24:46 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Gregory E. Montes urban history and travel collection
did.abstract: Travel brochures, city guides, maps, books of views, postcards, and related materials.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Travel brochures, city guides, maps, books of views, postcards, and related materials documenting world cities and tourism in the 19th and 20th centuries. The Montes collection also includes more than 1,000 books (most cataloged separately and searchable in the library catalog) on world cities and urban areas, the majority published between 1798 and 1960.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Donated by Gregory E. Montes in memory of Dr. Gustavo E. and Marica S. Montes.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Books United States Non-United States General, Africa, Asia, Australia/Oceania, Europe, North America
Series II. Guides United States Non-United States General, Africa, Asia, Europe, North America, South America
Series III. Postcards United States Non-United States General, Africa, Asia, Australia/Oceania, Europe, North America, South America

ref.emph: Series IV. Additional Items, Miscellaneous, Ephemera Posters, Artwork

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Gregory E. Montes urban history and travel collection, #8035. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Books

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Only some books are listed here. The majority are available in the library catalog by searching for keywords Gregory Montes.

did.unittitle: Books - United States
State / Region: Arizona, SouthernTitle: Gadsden's Silent ObserversAuthor: Keasey, Merritt S. III
State / Region: Arizona, Yuma (Prison) Title: Prison Centennial 1876-1976Author: Trafzer, Cliff / George, Steve
State / Region: Arizona, Yuma (Prison) Title: The Hell HoleAuthor: Brent, Wm. & Milarde
State / Region: California, AlamedaTitle: The Urban Area of the Alameda 1500-1520Author: Gregory Montes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This is thesis prepared by Montes with the assistance of Professor George Kubler and his advisor Professor Heinrich Klotz in Spring of 1969.

South America
Country / Region: Brazil, Argentina,Colombia, Rio de Janiero, Buenos Aires# of packets: 3# of items: 24
Series IV. Additional Items, Miscellaneous, Ephemera Posters, Artwork
Handwritten partial inventory from Montes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes extensive notes on the acquisition and importance of some if the items, particularly the artwork.

did.unittitle: Country / Region: Brazil, Rio de Janeiro "Ausreise nach Brasilien, Der braislianische Dampfer Raul Soares" Scrapbook of photographs in German from the 1930s showing a German family in Brazil, shows many areas.
Misc. Photos, Stamps, Small Postcard Booklets # of packets: 42# of items: 55
Country / Region :United States General Matchbook Covers # of packets: 3# of items: 3
Country / Region: South America Pictorial South America magazine

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Buenos Aires Argentina, Rio de Janeiro and Sao Paulo Brazil and others.

did.unittitle: Country / Region: United States General Four military aviation prints. T-39 Sabreliner at Los Angeles, USAF Minuteman ICBM, 2 of a NASA Saturn V at Kennedy Space Center Florida.
Country / Region: California, San Diego The Disinterred Agent poster. Aposcar Guevara Cruz, shows the Coronado Bridge.
Country / Region: California, San Diego Bario Block Party poster
Country / Region: California, Newport Beach "Newport Beach Harbor" painting by David Goff
Country / Region: California, San Diego "30th and Juniper" painting by Judith D'Agostino
Country / Region: California, San Diego "Cityscape" print signed by the artist Christopher Pantaleoni
Country / Region: Hawaii "Voyage" print signed to Montes by the artist Steve Matson
Country / Region: California? Signed print by Jon Ascher for the graphic novel Neil. Shows a skyline at night with two figures in the foreground, possibly San Francisco.
Country / Region: Mexico City, San Diego"A photo series documenting street musicians from various cities around the world."
Country / Region: New York, Coney Island16 photos, 1940-1950.

Country / Region: California, San DiegoPhoto of Turf Supper Club, Pacific Beach Pier, postcards for "Reappropriation of Assets", "Blight Elimination Plan", "Reactive vs Proactive", activist photos of "America's Finest Library!", "Public Restrooms: Smart Corner", "Who is this for?", "Juego Aqui Mañana", "Home".
Country / Region: CanadaCanada 125 newspaper, volume 1, number 3

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Canada 125 bumper sticker, a celebration of Canada's Birthday.

did.unittitle: United Nations Commemorative Envelopes 1
United Nations Commemorative Envelopes 2
United Nations Commemorative Envelopes 3
First Day of Issue Envelopes 1

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 71 envelopes primarily commemorating events from American history

did.unittitle: First Day of Issue Envelopes 2

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 66 envelopes primarily commemorating events from American and World history

did.unittitle: Ralph Dyer First Day of Issue Covers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Hand-drawn drafts of First Day covers, often accompanied by feedback, some drafts marked as never used.

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous photos

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cuba, San Diego, Miscellaneous United States, set of photos by Dominic Caesar including negatives, photos of paintings "New York City Skyline" and "San Diego Skyline" by Sean Selfridge, "Yosemite" by June Rubin

did.unittitle: Artist business cards

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Business cards produced by artists, either standard 3.5" X 2" or 6" X 4" (with photographs of artwork). Includes: Studio Maha, Bronle Crosby business cards with examples of photography/painting, Jeffery Rule, Inc. Landscape Architecture business card "Bristletone Pine" preview,

did.unittitle: Country / Region: California, San Diego Newspaper clippings: Beach and Bay Press, San Diego CityBeat, San Diego Reader, The San Diego Union "Desperation in Hanoi's Acts"
The Coca-Cola Company International Headquarters

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Packet of 20 photos with captions.

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous Brochures: Attractions

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes brochures from Boston, San Diego, Dido Cabaret (Champs-Élysées, Paris)

did.unittitle: Miscellaneous Brochures: Travel Maps and Info

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: maps of Boston; Rostock, Germany; Madrid, Spain; Dublin, Ireland; Oahu, Hawaii; Texas; Airline brochures for United Air Lines Jets, Lufthansa

did.unittitle: Artwork

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Miscellaneous brochures and advertisements of artists mostly from the San Diego area, a Christmas card from an Anglophone in France, 1944, Enrico Natali, Dirk Tiede

did.unittitle: Postcard Packs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Pretoria, South Africa; Shanghai, China; Rio de Janeiro, Brazil; Bruxelles, Belgium; Metropolitan Areas of Boston, Bridgeport, New York, Philadelphia, Baltimore, Washington DC

did.unittitle: Matchboxes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 12 matchboxes with advertisements on them

did.unittitle: Color Transparencies

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A box of 14 color transparencies, marked as "World's Fair"

did.unittitle: Japex 79

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Commemorative card written in Japanese.

did.unittitle: Manor House Quarterly: "Space"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Periodical Literary Magazine
